name: Surge the Tenrec | Stealing the Christmas
description:
"Maybe Christmas (she though) doesn't comes from a store. Maybe Christmas perhaps means a little bit more."

________________________________________

Kitsunami went off to celebrate Christmas with Tails and the others... Surge stayed home. Weighed down by loneliness, she decided to steal Christmas from everyone on Mobius, thinking that this would help her feel some relief. She thinks that the whole point of Christmas is only presents, decorations and food...

________________________________________

Would you prove her wrong and save the Christmas? Everything is in your hands.
creator: DeJolt
